rationale: Both papers are in the same theatrical-to-home-video context and center on dynamic advertising responsiveness, carryover/goodwill, WOM interaction, and ad scheduling/allocation (as described in the two paper notes). Given this strong construct and domain overlap, the 2010 JMKR paper is plausibly a methodological or substantive prior benchmark rather than an incidental background mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
